title: Class Define
description: Define a simple Ruby class with a single reader attribute.
problemStatement:
OOP basics! Define a class named `Book`. Use `attr_reader` to create a getter for the symbol `:title`.

**Requirement:** Use the `class` and `end` keywords.
hints: Classes in Ruby are blueprints for objects. `attr_reader` is a shortcut for creating a getter method.
expectedOutput: A class definition with a title reader
